# Code of Conduct

This repository is a public, professional collaboration space for
open-source neuroscience research.

We expect participants to be respectful, constructive, and inclusive.
Harassment, discrimination, personal attacks, intimidation, and the
publication of private information are not acceptable.

Please keep discussions focused on the work, assume good intent, and
help maintain a welcoming environment for contributors and users with
different backgrounds and levels of experience.

If you observe behavior that does not meet these expectations, please
avoid escalating publicly when possible. For sensitive concerns, contact
the Lieber Institute through [info@libd.org](mailto:info@libd.org).
